queries.question: List the documentaries, their historical era setting and the events they describe, made by directors named Christopher.
queries.sql: SELECT HistoricalEra, Event FROM Documentary JOIN Director ON Documentary.DirectorID = Director.DirectorID WHERE fullname LIKE 'Christopher %'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?historicalera ?event WHERE {
  ?documentary a :Documentary .
  ?director a :Director .
  ?documentary p:hasDirector ?director .
  ?documentary p:HistoricalEra ?historicalera .
  ?documentary p:Event ?event .
  ?director p:name ?fullname_lk .
  FILTER(REGEX(STR(?fullname_lk), "^Christopher\\ .*$", "i"))
}

queries.question: Display a list of documentaries and their contexts made by directors named Christopher.
queries.sql: SELECT Event FROM Documentary JOIN Director ON Documentary.DirectorID = Director.DirectorID WHERE fullname LIKE 'Christopher %'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?event WHERE {
  ?documentary a :Documentary .
  ?director a :Director .
  ?documentary p:hasDirector ?director .
  ?documentary p:Event ?event .
  ?director p:name ?fullname_lk .
  FILTER(REGEX(STR(?fullname_lk), "^Christopher\\ .*$", "i"))

queries.question: What's the name and historical era of the documentary created by the oldest filmmaker?
queries.sql: SELECT Title, HistoricalEra FROM Documentary JOIN Director ON Documentary.DirectorID = Director.DirectorID ORDER BY BirthYear DESC LIMIT 1;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?historicalera WHERE {
  ?documentary a :Documentary .
  ?director a :Director .
  ?documentary p:hasDirector ?director .
  ?documentary p:Title ?title .
  ?documentary p:HistoricalEra ?historicalera .
  ?director p:BirthYear ?birthyear_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?birthyear_o)
LIMIT 1

queries.question: What's the name and event shown in the documentary created by the oldest filmmaker?
queries.sql: SELECT Title, Event FROM Documentary JOIN Director ON Documentary.DirectorID = Director.DirectorID ORDER BY BirthYear DESC LIMIT 1;
queries.sparql:

PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?event WHERE {
  ?documentary a :Documentary .
  ?director a :Director .
  ?documentary p:hasDirector ?director .
  ?documentary p:Title ?title .
  ?documentary p:Event ?event .
  ?director p:BirthYear ?birthyear_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?birthyear_o)
LIMIT 1
